name: Tier clamp: max STRONG without clinical POSITIVE
what_it_solves: Non-negotiable engine rule: 'Tier clamp: max STRONG without clinical POSITIVE'
how_it_solves: Post-fuser clamp: if no modality with weight==4 (clinical) returned POSITIVE, final tier is capped at STRONG.
why_it_exists: Prevents 'STRONG cell-line + STRONG in-vivo → VALIDATED' short-circuits.
